recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: A Patch of Blue
recommendations.overview: A blind, uneducated white girl is befriended by a black man, who becomes determined to help her escape her impoverished and abusive home life.

recommendations.title: The Neighbor
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man in a stagnant marriage, finds his life upended when an attractive young woman and her seemingly abusive husband move in next door.

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.

recommendations.title: Dust Devil
recommendations.overview: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

recommendations.title: Inconceivable
recommendations.overview: A mother looks to escape her abusive past by moving to a new town where she befriends another mother, who grows suspicious of her.

recommendations.title: Delicacy
recommendations.overview: A French woman mourning over the death of her husband three years prior is courted by a Swedish co-worker.

recommendations.title: Dil Se..
recommendations.overview: Journalist Amar falls for a mysterious woman on an assignment, but she does not reciprocate his feelings. However, when Amar is about to get married, the woman shows up at his doorstep asking for help.

recommendations.title: I Want You
recommendations.overview: After two years away, Hache returns to Barcelona seeking a fresh start. Falling for Gin while facing unresolved feelings for Babi, he must confront love, loss, and who he's becoming.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.
